findings.evidence: PR line 141 defines the lemma; Mathlib has `Submodule.map_comp` at `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Module/Submodule/Map.lean:104`, `Submodule.map_id` at line 101, and `Submodule.map_neg` at line 484.
findings.fix: Remove the new lemma, or keep it private/local to this file; in `image`/`image_iff`, rewrite with existing API, e.g. `rw [← Submodule.map_comp, hJ, Submodule.map_neg, Submodule.map_id]` with orientation adjusted as needed.
findings.issue: `Submodule.map_map_eq_of_comp_self_eq_neg_id` is a public special-case wrapper around existing `Submodule.map_comp`, `Submodule.map_neg`, and `Submodule.map_id`, creating parallel API for double-mapping by an endomorphism with square `-1`.

summary: One public support lemma duplicates existing `Submodule.map` composition/negation/id API as a special case; the totally-real predicate itself does not duplicate an existing submodule-level notion.
